text.title: OKR Cascade Multi-Squad Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the exact shape of the cascade artifacts. Subagent must satisfy this before returning a quarter-ready bundle.

forbidden.pattern: company_okr_set with > 3 objectives OR any objective with > 5 key_results
ownership_map where a company_kr_id maps to a list / multiple squads
key_results that read as tasks ("ship feature X", "launch Y") instead of measurable outcomes
dependency_graph empty OR fewer edges than (squad_count - 1) — almost certainly hidden dependencies
squad OKR document with no Inbound or Outbound section
aspirational language without baseline_value and target_value numbers

allowed-transformations.transformation: A company KR may be "split" into 2 squad KRs at different layers (e.g., a leading + lagging pair) provided each has its own measurement source.
Stretch KRs may carry a "stretch" flag with target_value separate from a "commit" target_value; both must be numeric.
Contributor squads may list a company KR in their "supporting" section without being Owner — does not violate single-threaded ownership.

list.item: every squad has 1-3 Os, each O has 3-5 KRs with numeric baseline + target
ownership_map is a function (one squad per company KR), not a relation
each dependency edge has from, to, artifact, due_week populated
weekly check-in cadence specifies exact times, not "weekly"
previous quarter retro is referenced (if not Q1) with date
